apps.label: DOPE Projected Feed Colorama APK
apps.description: Bundled public DOPE projected-feed multi-layer Colorama runtime. The current public companion mirrors install, launch, device-profile, and scene-profile staging for this APK, and the bundled hotload CSV profiles are consumed directly by the live Unity runtime with startup diagnostics readback.

apps.label: Rusty DOPE Colorama Feedback Border APK
apps.description: Rust/Makepad OpenXR Colorama feedback-border runtime. The companion can install it, launch it with the required headset-camera permissions and debug.rustydope launch properties, and stage Rust-specific hotload CSV profiles for hotload-capable Rusty DOPE builds. Unity hotload profiles, live variable setters, twin readback, and focused/media streaming controls are not wired for this target.

bundles.label: DOPE Public Stack
bundles.description: Bundled Unity projected-feed Colorama runtime plus the curated device and scene profile set used by the public DOPE operator app.

bundles.label: Rusty DOPE Colorama Stack
bundles.description: Rust/Makepad Colorama feedback-border runtime. Install, launch, and Rust-specific staged CSV profiles are supported for hotload-capable builds; Unity runtime-config, live twin, and focused/media streaming controls are intentionally not advertised.
